detection_rule: pyNN.spiNNaker target or board/chip placement unavailable
required_response: preserve prepared artifacts; do not mark hardware fail

detection_rule: local parity passes but remote path parity fails
required_response: inspect routing table construction and key masks

detection_rule: wrong shard, wrong partition, stale reply, or duplicate reply appears
value packets return without matching metadata packets
payload length expands beyond compact readback contract

required_response: repair package/runbook; preserve failure as noncanonical

detection_rule: report claims speedup, benchmark superiority, or baseline freeze
required_response: correct docs and rerun audit before commit
